children.text: Identification in budget materials of amounts for declassification activities and limitation on expenditures for such activities

The Secretary of Energy shall include in the budget justification materials submitted to Congress in support of the Department of Energy budget for any fiscal year (as submitted with the budget of the President under

children.tail: ) specific identification, as a budgetary line item, of the amounts required to carry out programmed activities during that fiscal year to declassify records pursuant to Executive Order No. 13526 (
note), or any successor Executive order, or to comply with any statutory requirement to declassify Government records.

children.text: Certification Required With Respect to Automatic Declassification of Records
No records of the Department of Energy that have not as of

children.tail: , been reviewed for declassification shall be subject to automatic declassification unless the Secretary of Energy certifies to Congress that such declassification would not harm the national security.

children.text: Pub. L. 119–60, div. C, title XXXI, § 3111(a)
Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in

children.tail: , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by
